lines.gurmukhi: ਜਤਨ ਭਾਂਤਨ ਤਪਨ ਭ੍ਰਮਨ ਅਨਿਕ ਕਥਨ ਕਥਤੇ ਨਹੀ ਥਾਹ ਪਾਈ ਠਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: jatan bhaantan tapan bhraman anik kathan kathate nahee thaah paaee tthaau |
lines.english: All sorts of efforts, austerities, wanderings and various speeches - none of these will lead you to find the Lord's Place.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਟਨ ਖਟਨ ਜਟਨ ਹੋਮਨ ਨਾਹੀ ਡੰਡਧਾਰ ਸੁਆਉ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: tattan khattan jattan homan naahee ddanddadhaar suaau |1|
lines.english: Making pilgrimages to sacred rivers, observing the six rituals, wearing matted and tangled hair, performing fire sacrifices and carrying ceremonial walking sticks - none of these are of any use. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੋਧਿ ਸਗਰ ਸੋਧਨਾ ਸੁਖੁ ਨਾਨਕਾ ਭਜੁ ਨਾਉ ॥੨॥੨॥੩੯॥
lines.translit: sodh sagar sodhanaa sukh naanakaa bhaj naau |2|2|39|
lines.english: I have considered all considerations, O Nanak, but peace comes only by vibrating and meditating on the Name. ||2||2||39||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਾਨੜਾ ਮਹਲਾ ੫ ਘਰੁ ੯ ॥
lines.translit: kaanarraa mahalaa 5 ghar 9 |
lines.english: Kaanraa, Fifth Mehl, Ninth House:

lines.gurmukhi: ੴ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਪ੍ਰਸਾਦਿ ॥
lines.translit: ik oankaar satigur prasaad |
lines.english: One Universal Creator God. By The Grace Of The True Guru:

lines.gurmukhi: ਨੈਨ ਤਿਪਤੇ ਦਰਸੁ ਪੇਖਿ ਜਸੁ ਤੋਖਿ ਸੁਨਤ ਕਰਨ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: nain tipate daras pekh jas tokh sunat karan |1|
lines.english: My eyes are satisfied, gazing upon the Blessed Vision of His Darshan; my ears are satisfied, hearing His Praise. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਤਿਤ ਪਾਵਨੁ ਭਗਤਿ ਬਛਲੁ ਭੈ ਹਰਨ ਤਾਰਨ ਤਰਨ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: patit paavan bhagat bachhal bhai haran taaran taran |1| rahaau |
lines.english: The Purifier of sinners, the Lover of His devotees, the Destroyer of fear - He carries us across to the other side. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਪ੍ਰਾਨ ਨਾਥ ਅਨਾਥ ਦਾਤੇ ਦੀਨ ਗੋਬਿਦ ਸਰਨ ॥
lines.translit: praan naath anaath daate deen gobid saran |
lines.english: He is the Master of the praanaa, the breath of life; He is the Giver of Support to the unsupported. I am meek and poor - I seek the Sanctuary of the Lord of the Universe.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਸ ਪੂਰਨ ਦੁਖ ਬਿਨਾਸਨ ਗਹੀ ਓਟ ਨਾਨਕ ਹਰਿ ਚਰਨ ॥੨॥੧॥੪੦॥
lines.translit: aas pooran dukh binaasan gahee ott naanak har charan |2|1|40|
lines.english: He is the Fulfiller of hope, the Destroyer of pain. Nanak grasps the Support of the Feet of the Lord. ||2||1||40||

lines.gurmukhi: ਚਰਨ ਸਰਨ ਦਇਆਲ ਠਾਕੁਰ ਆਨ ਨਾਹੀ ਜਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: charan saran deaal tthaakur aan naahee jaae |
lines.english: I seek the Sanctuary of the Feet of my Merciful Lord and Master; I do not go anywhere else.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਾਨੜਾ ਮਹਲਾ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: kaanarraa mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Kaanraa, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੈਸਾਰ ਗਾਰ ਬਿਕਾਰ ਸਾਗਰ ਪਤਿਤ ਮੋਹ ਮਾਨ ਅੰਧ ॥
lines.translit: saisaar gaar bikaar saagar patit moh maan andh |
lines.english: The world is a swamp of wickedness and corruption. The blind sinner has fallen into the ocean of emotional attachment and pride,

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਤਿਤ ਪਾਵਨ ਬਿਰਦੁ ਸੁਆਮੀ ਉਧਰਤੇ ਹਰਿ ਧਿਆਇ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: patit paavan birad suaamee udharate har dhiaae |1| rahaau |
lines.english: It is the Inherent Nature of our Lord and Master to purify sinners. Those who meditate on the Lord are saved. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਕਲ ਮਾਇਆ ਸੰਗਿ ਧੰਧ ॥
lines.translit: bikal maaeaa sang dhandh |
lines.english: bewildered by the entanglements of Maya.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਰੁ ਗਹੇ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਆਪਿ ਕਾਢਹੁ ਰਾਖਿ ਲੇਹੁ ਗੋਬਿੰਦ ਰਾਇ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: kar gahe prabh aap kaadtahu raakh lehu gobind raae |1|
lines.english: God Himself has taken me by the hand and lifted me up and out of it; save me, O Sovereign Lord of the Universe. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਪ੍ਰਭ ਪੂਰਨ ਗੁਨਤਾਸ ॥
lines.translit: prabh pooran gunataas |
lines.english: God is the Perfect Treasure of Virtue.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਨਾਥ ਨਾਥ ਸਨਾਥ ਸੰਤਨ ਕੋਟਿ ਪਾਪ ਬਿਨਾਸ ॥
lines.translit: anaath naath sanaath santan kott paap binaas |
lines.english: He is the Master of the masterless, the Supporting Lord of the Saints, the Neutralizer of millions of sins.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨਿ ਦਰਸਨੈ ਕੀ ਪਿਆਸ ॥
lines.translit: man darasanai kee piaas |
lines.english: My mind thirsts for the Blessed Vision of His Darshan.

lines.gurmukhi: ਵਾਰਿ ਵਾਰਉ ਅਨਿਕ ਡਾਰਉ ॥
lines.translit: vaar vaarau anik ddaarau |
lines.english: Countless times, I am a sacrifice, a sacrifice

lines.gurmukhi: ਕ੍ਰਿਪਾਲ ਦਇਆਲ ਗੁਪਾਲ ਨਾਨਕ ਹਰਿ ਰਸਨਾ ਗੁਨ ਗਾਇ ॥੨॥੨॥੪੧॥
lines.translit: kripaal deaal gupaal naanak har rasanaa gun gaae |2|2|41|
lines.english: O Nanak, sing and savor the Glorious Praises of the Lord, the Kind and Compassionate Lord of the World. ||2||2||41||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਾਨੜਾ ਮਹਲਾ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: kaanarraa mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Kaanraa, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਨਿਕ ਮੰਦਰ ਪਾਟ ਸੇਜ ਸਖੀ ਮੋਹਿ ਨਾਹਿ ਇਨ ਸਿਉ ਤਾਤ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: kanik mandar paatt sej sakhee mohi naeh in siau taat |1|
lines.english: Mansions of gold, and beds of silk sheets - O sisters, I have no love for these. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੁਖੁ ਪ੍ਰਿਅ ਸੁਹਾਗ ਪਲਕ ਰਾਤ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: sukh pria suhaag palak raat |1| rahaau |
lines.english: to that moment of peace, on that night when I was joined with my Beloved. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੁਕਤ ਲਾਲ ਅਨਿਕ ਭੋਗ ਬਿਨੁ ਨਾਮ ਨਾਨਕ ਹਾਤ ॥
lines.translit: mukat laal anik bhog bin naam naanak haat |
lines.english: Pearls, jewels and countless pleasures, O Nanak, are useless and destructive without the Naam, the Name of the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਰੂਖੋ ਭੋਜਨੁ ਭੂਮਿ ਸੈਨ ਸਖੀ ਪ੍ਰਿਅ ਸੰਗਿ ਸੂਖਿ ਬਿਹਾਤ ॥੨॥੩॥੪੨॥
lines.translit: rookho bhojan bhoom sain sakhee pria sang sookh bihaat |2|3|42|
lines.english: Even with only dry crusts of bread, and a hard floor on which to sleep, my life passes in peace and pleasure with my Beloved, O sisters. ||2||3||42||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰੁ ਗੁਰੁ ਕਰਤ ਮਨੁ ਲੋਰੋ ॥
lines.translit: gur gur karat man loro |
lines.english: Let your yearning mind call out, "Guru, Guru".

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਾਨੜਾ ਮਹਲਾ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: kaanarraa mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Kaanraa, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਹੰ ਤੋਰੋ ਮੁਖੁ ਜੋਰੋ ॥
lines.translit: ahan toro mukh joro |
lines.english: Give up your ego, and turn your face to God.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗ੍ਰਿਹਿ ਸੇਜ ਸੁਹਾਵੀ ਆਗਨਿ ਚੈਨਾ ਤੋਰੋ ਰੀ ਤੋਰੋ ਪੰਚ ਦੂਤਨ ਸਿਉ ਸੰਗੁ ਤੋਰੋ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: grihi sej suhaavee aagan chainaa toro ree toro panch dootan siau sang toro |1|
lines.english: The bed of your household shall be cozy, and your courtyard shall be comfortable; shatter and break the bonds which tie you to the five thieves. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਪ੍ਰਿਅ ਪ੍ਰੀਤਿ ਪਿਆਰੋ ਮੋਰੋ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: pria preet piaaro moro |1| rahaau |
lines.english: My Beloved is the Lover of Love. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਇ ਨ ਜਾਇ ਬਸੇ ਨਿਜ ਆਸਨਿ ਊਂਧ ਕਮਲ ਬਿਗਸੋਰੋ ॥
lines.translit: aae na jaae base nij aasan aoondh kamal bigasoro |
lines.english: You shall not come and go in reincarnation; you shall dwell in your own home deep within, and your inverted heart-lotus shall blossom forth.

lines.gurmukhi: ਛੁਟਕੀ ਹਉਮੈ ਸੋਰੋ ॥
lines.translit: chhuttakee haumai soro |
lines.english: The turmoil of egotism shall be silenced.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਾਨੜਾ ਮਃ ੫ ਘਰੁ ੯ ॥
lines.translit: kaanarraa mahalaa 5 ghar 9 |
lines.english: Kaanraa, Fifth Mehl, Ninth House:

lines.gurmukhi: ਗਾਇਓ ਰੀ ਗਾਇਓ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਨਾਨਕ ਗੁਨੀ ਗਹੇਰੋ ॥੨॥੪॥੪੩॥
lines.translit: gaaeo ree gaaeo prabh naanak gunee gahero |2|4|43|
lines.english: Nanak sings - he sings the Praises of God, the Ocean of Virtue. ||2||4||43||

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਾਂ ਤੇ ਜਾਪਿ ਮਨਾ ਹਰਿ ਜਾਪਿ ॥
lines.translit: taan te jaap manaa har jaap |
lines.english: This is why you should chant and meditate on the Lord, O mind.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੋ ਸੰਤ ਬੇਦ ਕਹਤ ਪੰਥੁ ਗਾਖਰੋ ਮੋਹ ਮਗਨ ਅਹੰ ਤਾਪ ॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: jo sant bed kehat panth gaakharo moh magan ahan taap | rahaau |
lines.english: The Vedas and the Saints say that the path is treacherous and difficult. You are intoxicated with emotional attachment and the fever of egotism. ||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੋ ਰਾਤੇ ਮਾਤੇ ਸੰਗਿ ਬਪੁਰੀ ਮਾਇਆ ਮੋਹ ਸੰਤਾਪ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: jo raate maate sang bapuree maaeaa moh santaap |1|
lines.english: Those who are imbued and intoxicated with the wretched Maya, suffer the pains of emotional attachment. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਨਸਿ ਜਾਇ ਮੋਹ ਭੈ ਭਰਮਾ ਨਾਨਕ ਸੰਤ ਪ੍ਰਤਾਪ ॥੨॥੫॥੪੪॥
lines.translit: binas jaae moh bhai bharamaa naanak sant prataap |2|5|44|
lines.english: Emotional attachment, fear and doubt are dispelled, O Nanak, by the Grace of the Saints. ||2||5||44||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਮੁ ਜਪਤ ਸੋਊ ਜਨੁ ਉਧਰੈ ਜਿਸਹਿ ਉਧਾਰਹੁ ਆਪ ॥
lines.translit: naam japat soaoo jan udharai jiseh udhaarahu aap |
lines.english: That humble being is saved, who chants the Naam; You Yourself save him.
